meta.homeDescription: PluggLAB is a Minecraft plugin lab for stable, free releases, community tools, and a transparent release queue.
meta.homeOgDescription: Discover free, actively developed Minecraft plugins and packs from PluggLAB — MemoryChain, PulseEvents, Casino Core, and more.
meta.contactDescription: Contact PluggLAB for plugin support, release questions, or new project requests.
meta.changelogDescription: Live plugin status, current versions, and release history for every PluggLAB project.
meta.downloadPendingDescription: Track every plugin currently waiting for review, testing, or public release.

nav.statusShort: Innovation lab for Minecraft plugins & experiences

footer.tagline: A focused Minecraft plugin lab — free releases, clear updates, and a shared architecture behind every project.

home.heroSubtitle: A focused Minecraft plugin lab delivering stable releases, free tools, and clear project progress. Browse live plugins, the shared release queue, and the latest updates in one polished view.
home.panelBody: Open free plugins, check what is pending approval, or jump straight into the full project list from one compact panel.
home.stackFreeNote: Shared update campaign across the lab
home.stackCommunityNote: Feedback and support for every project
home.featuredCopy: A broader view of the lab with stable releases, free plugins, and a shared release queue for all pending builds.
home.featuredMainBody: PluggLAB now presents the full plugin ecosystem with a shared release queue, clear free-access labels, and a faster path from development to download.
home.featuredMainNote: A wider site refresh is underway to make every plugin easier to find and every release easier to follow.
home.featuredRule1: Every free plugin is marked clearly
home.featuredRule2: Pending builds now use one shared release queue
home.featuredRule3: Plugins and packs stay separated by filters
home.featuredNavBody: Use the hero shortcuts for common actions, then use filters below when you want to narrow the list by type, free status, or work in progress.
home.summaryFreeBody: Every plugin and pack in PluggLAB is free and actively developed.
home.summaryPendingBody: Any plugin waiting for release now routes through one shared release workflow instead of manual status entries.
home.summaryBrowseBody: Project cards now expose type, availability, and the primary next action at a glance.
home.searchHint: Search by project name, type, status, or description.
home.emptyState: No projects match the current filter.
home.roadmapCopy: A clearer view of what is shipping now, what is stabilizing, and what is being prepared.
home.roadmapNowBody: A shared plugin architecture is being shaped to support multiple PluggLAB releases and planned integrations.
home.roadmapNextBody: Casino Core expands into server gameplay with stronger reward and admin flows.
home.roadmapLaterBody: Visual packs, event utilities, and shared integrations settle into one consistent stack.
home.aboutCopy: PluggLAB is a polished Minecraft hub for stable plugins, free tools, and clear project updates. Everything here is designed to feel more professional, approachable, and ready for actual use.
home.feature1Body: Every project is built with attention to detail, performance, and user experience. No rushed releases.
home.feature2Body: Regular updates, community feedback integration, and continuous improvement across all projects.
home.feature3Body: Projects are designed to evolve and scale. A shared plugin architecture guides updates across the full ecosystem.
home.feature4Body: Join Discord for updates, support, and direct feedback. Your input shapes future development.
home.creatorCopy: Meet the developer building the PluggLAB ecosystem.
home.creatorBio1: Wilczek is a passionate Minecraft developer with years of experience in plugin development, server optimization, and community management. Specializing in scalable plugin architecture and modular systems design.
home.creatorBio2: Founded PluggLAB to create a focused hub for high-quality Minecraft projects that set new standards for the community. Every project is built with attention to detail, performance, and user experience.
home.creatorCtaText: Interested in collaborating or learning more?
home.supportBody: PluggLAB stays free thanks to community support on Ko-fi.

projectCard.memorychainDesc: Shared plugin architecture and update foundation.
projectCard.pulseeventsDesc: Dynamic event system for Minecraft servers.
projectCard.casinocoreDesc: Modular casino engine with reward systems and slot mechanics.
projectCard.safetradeDesc: Protected player-to-player trading with confirmation flow and anti-scam checks.
projectCard.voidspireDesc: A space-themed texture pack designed for exploration and wonder.

contact.heroCopy: Reach out for plugin support, release questions, or new development ideas across the entire PluggLAB ecosystem.
contact.heroNote: Email for direct requests, Discord for community support, or the form for structured feature and collaboration requests.
contact.pricingCopy: PluggLAB free plugins are available now, and ongoing updates are being released across the full suite of projects.
contact.pricingNote: All free releases include ongoing updates, Discord-based support, and access to future improvements. Use the contact channels below for setup help or collaboration.
contact.emailBody: Best for direct communication and collaboration requests.
contact.discordBody: Best for quick help, discussions, and community interaction.
contact.formBody: Use this for detailed requests, commissions, or structured ideas.
contact.quickCopy: This opens your email client with the message pre-filled — nothing is sent from this page or stored anywhere.
contact.quickHint: Prefer Discord? Ping the community instead — it's usually faster.

changelog.heroCopy: A transparent look at what is live right now, current versions, and what shipped recently across the PluggLAB ecosystem.
changelog.statusSectionCopy: Pulled from the same status feed the PluggLAB Android app uses — this page and the app are always in sync.
changelog.historyCopy: A running log of what shipped, what changed, and what is coming next.
changelog.loadErrorStatus: Could not load live status right now — try refreshing.

downloadPending.heroCopy: Every plugin not yet publicly released routes through one shared queue — no more guessing what's next.
downloadPending.stagesTitle: From build to Discord to download
downloadPending.stage1Body: Core systems are being built and tested internally before anything is shared.
downloadPending.stage2Body: Early builds are shared on Discord for feedback before a wider release.
downloadPending.stage3Body: Once stable, the plugin moves onto Modrinth or Spigot and into the main project grid.
downloadPending.queueCopy: General release slots reserved for the next PluggLAB drops.
downloadPending.notifyTitle: Want a heads-up when something ships?
downloadPending.notifyBody: Discord is the fastest way to hear about new releases the moment they go live.
